# core/ — generated by APX

This directory is generated by `apx add agent` and is **not checked in here**.

The template source lives at:
[`src/apx/templates/addons/agent/src/base/backend/core/`](../../../../../../src/apx/templates/addons/agent/src/base/backend/core/)

When you create your own project with APX, these files will be generated for you:

```
core/
├── __init__.py          # exports: create_app, create_router, Dependencies, logger
├── _base.py             # LifespanDependency base class
├── _config.py           # structured logging
├── _defaults.py         # default routes (/_apx/openapi.json etc.)
├── _factory.py          # create_app() / create_router() factory
├── _headers.py          # Databricks Apps header injection
├── _static.py           # static asset serving
├── agent.py             # Agent protocol: /invocations, /mcp, /.well-known/agent.json
└── dependencies.py      # Dependencies.Client, Dependencies.UserClient, Dependencies.Headers
```
